textByHash.06dfed200286c072e19baee7465900f797898323: I do have more rewards for you, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.
textByHash.09b9c83d5962910f84c6495d30b9f9ec2059acd5: Really? But... surely he can't have..? Please, let me have it, it must be extremely important for him to have sent a stranger.
textByHash.16a2e10ff698af971d3c4469c8e71ee11f3c6b7d: Of course. By the way, if you end up making any runes from the essence you mine, I'll happily buy them from you.
textByHash.1d09d07d7bc1e09313047183610f7685603df443: Now this is very important, is he trustworthy?
textByHash.22c1cd85a543e1604b10f27bda62bdcdc1d0ca73: Well, luckily I have duplicates. It's a good thing they are written in code, I would not want the wrong kind of person to get access to the information contained within.
textByHash.2ab271d9595cd7593c060346fcbd69bcf14295da: Well when we combine my own research with this latest discovery, I think we might just...
textByHash.3131a37ba0122c1a91491e41b3ed4a18b9031a48: This... this is incredible. Please, give me a few moments to quickly look over this, and then talk to me again.
textByHash.3d9bc5b540fb40886fc4f6ca43d022901dd2782c: Before you leave, why not have a cup of tea?
textByHash.44aee68716ea80154038aef9f0d7d2f0c99f7ff6: Why doesn't he get his own runes and sell them?
textByHash.47fe3461fda4f01893b6f792d242fc862a9f3eae: Well, if you find someone who does want runes, please send them my way.
textByHash.53b50ba85b92ed74645f60a3c4b39b76fcb347db: My gratitude to you adventurer for bringing me these research notes. Thanks to you, I think we finally have it.
textByHash.5f14307a9c9ebd2ac23a99919610cb3bf884fac0: Here, take these notes back to Sedridor. They should hopefully give him everything he needs.
textByHash.629a47c0b04b08bcc6c2e7cf1b2c1f495895b249: Now, did you want to buy some runes?
textByHash.68d5cd2909d5648deedd09c11f010c4a2ca0186d: Come back when you have it.
textByHash.74eba936fe8d95f623f8159a83f0a2f290cce094: Do you think that it will work? Will people actually buy these runes off him?
textByHash.770fe45787a4723db65802555de510ba9ae3949d: Oh, sorry , I didn't recognise you for a second, you're back again so soon. Have you spoken to Ali Morrisane yet about the runes?
textByHash.7f1ccec509f6d92080e0b45eb4a28f30145c03c4: Why yes, here are some air and mind runes.
textByHash.7f57bb9ff804bf4a7994aab0e4519975a9ee68b9: From Sedridor? But... surely, he can't have? Please, let me have it. It must be extremely important for him to have sent a stranger.
textByHash.80ecc62501b60139fa765bafb86e8aa1ca0533a7: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.
textByHash.820945d2729d483f5ba0922ae9f1c4a4bb22f2b0: Unless you were talking to me because you wished to buy some runes?
textByHash.9a472c00e98be0767f2377ebd2bb2321ab5d1403: My gratitude to you adventurer for bringing me these research notes. I notice that you brought the head wizard a special talisman that was the key to our finally unlocking the puzzle.
textByHash.9aae8807de29e65a5f042609860ee886594e61bf: Well, luckily I have duplicates. It's a good thing they are written in code. I wouldn't want the wrong kind of person to get access to the information contained within.
textByHash.ad98247ba52be7a0711b1b60d07d9129a30916ca: Don't take too long. He'll be eager to see if this is indeed the breakthrough we were hoping for.
textByHash.b02133d4309a11f8a90b9aaf03e143773d7e70fd: Combined with the information I had already collated regarding the Rune Essence, I think we have finally unlocked the power to
textByHash.bd3ca93f0c0ed5cad178cb75acde8f31c609f199: Great! Now, do want to buy some runes?
textByHash.bf7658c1ca3cd78c7bcc17f5b9f73498953d6c4c: The Cape of Runecrafting has been upgraded with each talisman, allowing you to access all Runecrafting altars. Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.c0ee4eafcc8c65a519d36616f7c073d08a32909d: I suggest you take those research notes of mine back to the head wizard at the Wizards' Tower.
textByHash.c21581bcd072fe97f04ad3e2cef9046569a06e10: Fair enough, I'll trust your judgement.
textByHash.c70f08517921eb035e885a17c7c08d597cc7765a: ...no. I am getting ahead of myself. Please take this summary of my research back to the head wizard at the Wizards' Tower. I trust his judgement on whether to let you in on our little secret or not.
textByHash.d2ce0e67c0860e35cb5b0a0babc168b9219cbdae: What kind of person tells me they have a delivery for me, but not with them? Honestly.
textByHash.d8da60ddc4c663b28b2f9e6b8fd7de90aebf0f4d: What kind of person says they have a delivery for me, but not with them? Honestly.
textByHash.e688acba7e8835c48cdc506a7c2e6b660819fdc6: Hello. Did you take those notes back to Sedridor?
textByHash.e90538567f09c4d214f31dc773051a89b84b8bea: Hmm, interesting... So let's get this straight, he wants me to supply him with runes, which he will sell, and send me the profits?
textByHash.eea89e1aa21f934d0f951839826c6cd7f6c8e72b: Do you want to buy some runes?
textByHash.f4697768ba92aee639fd407150a4e0ba9ad32da6: No, no, I'm getting ahead of myself. The signs are promising, but let's not jump to any conclusions just yet.
textByHash.f9a2339a220af73077e5249d49c94429829e2c60: Well if he's half as good a salesman as you suggest I should have no problem in funding my research and maybe even redecorating this place.
